MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-26-2022 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. CARINA JORDAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF VIA COURTCALL. JOHN BREKHUS, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT SETS AN ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE ISSUED TO ATTY. CARINA JORDAN FOR OCT-14-2022 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM TO SHOW CAUSE WHY SANCTIONS, IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00, SHOULD NOT BE IMPOSED FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. THE COURT CONTINUES THE TRIAL TO 9/28/22 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 FOR PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO APPEAR IN PERSON. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR THE APPEARANCE OF WITNESS REMOTELY AT TRIAL WILL BE UP TO THE TRIAL JUDGE. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
MASTER CALENDAR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-14-2022 ISSUED TO ATTORNEY CARINA JORDAN IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR AND DISCHARGED BY THE COURT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)
PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL OF GENERAL DENIAL WITH ATTACHMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 100148772) FILED BY DEFENDANT GALLAGHER, COLIN

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST ATTORNEY CARINA JORDAN FOR FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH THE COURT'S ORDER PURSUANT TO THE NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL AND TRIAL ORDER, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE OCT-13-2022. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. (206)

REMOVED FROM MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-28-2022 - CASE SETTLED. CARINA JORDAN, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE OSC OF 10/14/22 ISSUED TO ATTY. CARINA JORDAN IS DISCHARGED. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 610 ON NOV-07-2023 AT 10:30 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 3.1385. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF NOV-07-2023 CONTINUED TO DEC-12-2023 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT. JUDGE: ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO; CLERK: J. GUANDIQUE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (610)
